en.app.name: EPHERA
en.splash.headline: Voice. Intent. Money.
en.splash.sub: The future of finance is here.
en.welcome.question: How can I help you today?
en.welcome.hint: Tap to speak or say “Hey Ephera”
en.home.frozenBanner: Wallet frozen — outbound payments blocked. Tap to manage.
en.listening.title: Voice
en.services.title: What do you need?
en.invest.title: Invest
en.invest.newsTitle: Ghana Treasury bills yield eases as demand firms
en.invest.tickerHeadline: Gold & African equities lead weekly inflows
en.profile.title: Profile
en.settings.title: Settings
en.send.title: Confirm transfer
en.send.sub: Review recipient, cost and consequence — then authorise with passkey.
en.send.ok: Voice proposed · passkey required to release funds
en.receive.title: Get paid
en.receive.sub: Share your link or show your code. Funds credit to your wallet instantly.
en.freeze.title: Freeze wallet
en.freeze.body: Immediately blocks outbound transfers. Passkey required — voice alone cannot freeze or unfreeze.
en.freeze.bodyFrozen: Outbound transfers are blocked. Inbound payments still credit.
en.activity.title: Activity
en.activity.sub: All money in and out of your wallet.
en.notif.title: Notifications
en.voiceMode.title: Ephera Voice Mode
en.voiceMode.lead: From now on, interact with Ephera using only your voice.

fr.receive.sub: Partagez votre lien ou votre code. Les fonds arrivent instantanément.
fr.freeze.title: Geler le portefeuille
